title: LearningOutcome v1
description: Machine-readable schema for durable correction outcomes produced inside a question-bound answer-room flow.

learning-outcome/id.description: Stable identifier of the correction or confirmation outcome.

question/id.description: Question lifecycle identifier that roots the learning event.

room/id.description: Answer-room or tightly linked review path where the outcome emerged.

subject/ref.description: Reference to the disputed or reviewed answer artifact.

outcome/status.description: Epistemic result of the correction path.

decided-at.description: Timestamp at which the outcome was frozen.

decider/ref.description: Node, secretary, or policy actor that froze the outcome.

supporting/refs.description: Evidence, summary, transcript, or response references that support the outcome.

provenance/refs.description: Trace references sufficient to rebuild the causal chain of the outcome.

summary/ref.description: Accepted room summary reference when the outcome is expressed through a summary artifact.

response-envelope/ref.description: Corrected or accepted response-envelope reference when a final answer artifact exists.

reason/codes.description: Short machine-readable reason tags used by local policy and later audit.

human-linked/input.description: Whether the accepted or unresolved outcome depended on human-originated input.

policy/profile.description: Optional local or federation policy profile that governed the correction path.

policy_annotations.description: Optional implementation-local annotations that do not change the core outcome semantics.
